case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING VS PORTNOY ANATOLY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING AS TO DEFENDANT PORTNOY ANATOLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-04-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PORTNOY ANATOLY
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-04-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-18-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY PORTNOY ANATOLY AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
INVALID SERVICE AS TO AMERICAN CHECK, NO MAILING DONE ON SUBSERVICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PORTNOY ANATOLY $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $395.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT PORTNOY ANATOLY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT PORTNOY ANATOLY
